input_json_path.description: Path to BindCraft input JSON file. Field design_path must be "output" and starting_pdb must be "target.pdb".

num_replicas.description: Number of parallel replicas to run (default: 1). Each replica will stop when it reaches time_limit_seconds or when it generates the desired number of accepted designs.

settings_advanced.description: Path to advanced settings JSON for BindCraft

settings_filters.description: Path to filter settings JSON for BindCraft

time_limit_seconds.description: Time limit for the process in seconds (timeout is treated as a success)

alphafold_single_model.description: Use only one AlphaFold model instead of the default five (use only for testing purposes)
